title: Vasanta Rutu
original_poem:
వసంత ఋతువు వచ్చె,
ముగ్గురిపిల్లల నడుమ
మల్లెలు విరియ వేలు వెళ్ళియ, 
వెన్నెలవెలుగు జారె,
రెండు కళ్లు వెన్నెలవెలుగునొలకలె
నింగి నిలుపును తాకి, 
పచ్చని అడవి సవాలు వేస్తే.
english_translation:
The season of spring arrives,
Among three playful children
The jasmine blooms and the breeze sways, 
The moonlight spreads softly,
Two eyes glow with the light of the moon,
Reaching to touch the sky, 
The green forest throws a challenge.

metaphor_spans.abstract_meaning: eyes brimming with moonlight as vessels of spring's luminous wonder
the green forest asserting its vitality as a rival to spring's arrival
Beauty or happiness spreading all around

stanza_emotions.loss_note: వెన్నెలవెలుగునొలకలె carries a sense of moonlight overflowing or spilling from the eyes, which 'glow with the light of the moon' only partially captures.

visual_motifs.motif: a lush green forest standing in bold challenge
eyes glowing with moonlight reaching the sky
green forest reaching toward the sky
green forest throwing a challenge
visual_motifs.reviewer_comment: It is a metaphor. You can't see this happen visually.

visual_motifs.motif: jasmine blooming among playful children
jasmine blooming in spring
jasmine blooms swaying in the breeze among three playful children
moonlight spreading softly across the scene
soft moonlight spreading
softly spreading moonlight
two eyes glowing with moonlight
two eyes overflowing with moonlight reaching toward the sky

reviewer_decision.reason: added 2 metaphors and removed a visual motif which is "green forest throwing a challenge".
